text.title: Plan-Execute vs ReAct Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are drivers present (known_substeps, horizon, adaptability_needed, audit_required, mixed_predictability)?

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND adaptability_needed == true AND horizon > 10 and mixed_predictability == true

conclusion.verdict: Pick Hybrid: top-level plan + per-step ReAct with max_turns=5.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND adaptability_needed == true AND horizon <= 10 or mixed_predictability == false
